## Checks

- [ ] The work is linked to an existing issue, or a new issue was created before implementation
- [ ] The issue is assigned to the correct milestone, or a new milestone was created
- [ ] The branch follows the repo naming convention
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commit format
- [ ] `docs/agent-memory/work-log.md` was updated
- [ ] `docs/agent-memory/decision-log.md` was updated if a durable decision changed
- [ ] Relevant tests or smoke checks were run and are listed below

## Validation

List the commands you ran and the result of each one.
